chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3229 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.18141/2025 2. For hearing of CMA No.13945/2025 3. For hearing of CMA No.13946/2025 4. For hearing of main case 15.09.2025 Mr. Musharraf Azhar, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. Ms. Humaira Jatoi, advocate for SBCA --------- The main grievance of the petitioner is that roof of Plot Nos.14/48 and 14/49, Survey Sheet No.35-P/1, Block 3 C&P Berar Cooperative Housing Society, Karachi, has been demolished as it was illegal construction, however, debris which resulted from the said demolition has not been removed. Learned counsel for the SBCA states that they shall remove the debris within 03 months of the date of this order and then shall reclaim the cost from the petitioner. A copy of this order shall be sent to the DG. SBCA for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
